---
title: "06 Data Workflows"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Main Question

How do we scale data workflows for vision systems?

## Runnable Example

```bash
uv run dvc repro localize
```

## Engineering Focus

Git tracks code, configs, tests, and docs. Runtime outputs live under `outputs/` and can be reproduced locally. DVC provides a boundary for replay artifacts and later larger datasets.

## Exercise

Inspect `dvc.yaml`, then add one scenario-specific replay target for a failure case you want to compare repeatedly.
